# kSecTrustResultValue

**Global Variable**

A key whose value represents the trust evaluation result.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecTrustResultValue: CFString
```

## Discussion

The key is present after trust evaluation completes. Its value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] that holds one of the values listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustResultType], indicating the outcome of the trust evaluation.
title: kSecTrustResultValue
